payload.answer: Recorded that the Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented, superseding the prior planned/open status for the MVP scope while preserving ambiguity about whether the full Slack agent is complete.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to the Brain Slack agent MVP, which appears to be the MVP scope of the existing Brain Slack agent project; it should update the prior planned/open status only for that scope unless broader completion is separately stated.

memory_cards.statement: The Brain Slack agent MVP is implemented; this supersedes the prior open/planned status for the MVP scope, but does not necessarily imply the full Slack agent is complete.

details: Committed new durable status: Brain Slack agent MVP implemented.
Did not retain the prior planned/open status as current for the MVP scope.
Preserved ambiguity between MVP completion and full project completion.
